purpose: One bounded local full-body Depth expansion using a locally prepared Depth Anything map from a true full-body original outside the excluded partial-body folder.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic full-length studio fitness photograph, one adult woman standing front-facing with both arms raised and both hands resting behind her head, entire person visible from head to bare feet, both elbows visible, both hands visible, coherent shoulders and arms, natural waist and hips, both legs fully visible, realistic knees and ankles, realistic bare feet and toes on the studio floor, fitted dark teal short-sleeve athletic shirt, high-waisted full-length charcoal leggings, natural skin texture, realistic face and hair, soft balanced studio lighting, clean light gray seamless background, depth-guided body volume, lifelike 50mm lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, distorted anatomy, extra person, duplicate body, extra arms, missing arms, fused arms, broken elbows, hands merged into hair, hidden hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, extra legs, missing legs, fused legs, broken knees, twisted ankles, missing feet, cropped head, cropped elbows, cropped hands, cropped feet, close-up portrait, seated pose, shoes, socks, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, logo, depth map overlay, grayscale depth stains, contour bands, control map leakage, nude, unclothed torso

qa_focus: head, elbows, hands, and both feet remain in frame
absence of depth-map bands or grayscale leakage
